sentences.sentence: On top of a striking new exhibition hall in southern Paris, the world's largest urban rooftop farm has started to bear fruit.
sentences.translation: 在巴黎南部一座引人注目的新展览大厅顶部，世界上最大的城市屋顶农场已经开始结果。

structure.text: On top of a striking new exhibition hall in southern Paris
the world's largest urban rooftop farm

difficult_points: 句首介词短语说明农场的位置，真正的主语是 the world's largest urban rooftop farm。
has started 使用现在完成时，强调农场已经进入产生结果的状态。
bear fruit 既可表示植物结果，也暗含项目开始见成效。

sentences.sentence: Strawberries that are small, intensely flavoured and resplendently red sprout abundantly from large plastic tubes.
sentences.translation: 小巧、味道浓郁且鲜红夺目的草莓从大型塑料管中大量冒出。

structure.text: that are small, intensely flavoured and resplendently red

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句，连续三个形容成分都在描述 strawberries。
intensely flavoured 和 resplendently red 是并列补充，突出草莓的味道和颜色。
from large plastic tubes 说明生长位置，不是动作的发出者。

sentences.sentence: Peer inside and you see the tubes are completely hollow, the roots of dozens of strawberry plants dangling down inside them.
sentences.translation: 向里面看，你会看到这些管子完全是空心的，几十株草莓的根垂在管子内部。

structure.text: the roots of dozens of strawberry plants dangling down inside them

difficult_points: Peer inside 是祈使句，相当于作者引导读者观察。
you see 后省略了 that，the tubes are completely hollow 是宾语从句。
the roots ... dangling down inside them 是独立主格结构，补充说明管内景象。

sentences.sentence: From identical vertical tubes nearby burst row upon row of lettuces; near those are aromatic herbs, such as basil, sage and peppermint.
sentences.translation: 附近同样的垂直管道里冒出一排又一排生菜；在那些管道旁边则是罗勒、鼠尾草和薄荷等芳香草本植物。

structure.text: such as basil, sage and peppermint

difficult_points: 句首 From identical vertical tubes nearby 使主谓倒装，主语是后面的 row upon row of lettuces。
分号连接两个相关分句，第二个分句同样以前置地点 near those 开头。
such as 引出 aromatic herbs 的具体例子。

sentences.sentence: Opposite, in narrow, horizontal trays packed not with soil but with coconut fibre, grow cherry tomatoes, shiny aubergines and brightly coloured chards.
sentences.translation: 在对面，狭窄的水平托盘中长着樱桃番茄、光亮的茄子和色彩鲜艳的甜菜，而这些托盘里装的不是土壤，而是椰壳纤维。

structure.text: in narrow, horizontal trays packed not with soil but with coconut fibre
packed not with soil but with coconut fibre
cherry tomatoes, shiny aubergines and brightly coloured chards

difficult_points: 地点成分前置造成倒装，主语是 grow 后面的三类作物。
packed not with soil but with coconut fibre 是过去分词短语，修饰 trays。
not with soil but with coconut fibre 构成对比，强调这种种植方式不用土。

expressions.text: not with soil but with coconut fibre
expressions.meaning_zh: 不是用土壤，而是用椰壳纤维

sentences.sentence: Pascal Hardy, an engineer and sustainable development consultant, began experimenting with vertical farming and aeroponic growing towers – as the soil-free plastic tubes are known – on his Paris apartment block roof five years ago.
sentences.translation: 五年前，工程师兼可持续发展顾问帕斯卡尔·哈迪开始在他巴黎公寓楼的屋顶上试验垂直农业和气雾栽培塔——这些无土塑料管就是这样被称呼的。

structure.text: an engineer and sustainable development consultant
began experimenting with vertical farming and aeroponic growing towers
as the soil-free plastic tubes are known
on his Paris apartment block roof five years ago

difficult_points: 逗号中的 an engineer and sustainable development consultant 是 Pascal Hardy 的同位语。
破折号中的 as the soil-free plastic tubes are known 解释 aeroponic growing towers 的叫法。
began experimenting with 后接动名词短语，表示开始进行相关试验。

sentences.sentence: The urban rooftop space above the exhibition hall is somewhat bigger: 14,000 square metres and almost exactly the size of a couple of football pitches.
sentences.translation: 展览大厅上方的城市屋顶空间要大一些：面积为14,000平方米，几乎正好相当于几个足球场的大小。

structure.text: The urban rooftop space above the exhibition hall
14,000 square metres and almost exactly the size of a couple of football pitches

difficult_points: 冒号后的面积和类比具体解释 somewhat bigger 的程度。
above the exhibition hall 修饰 rooftop space，说明空间所在位置。
a couple of football pitches 是面积类比，不是说屋顶上真的有足球场。

sentences.sentence: Already, the team of young urban farmers who tend it have picked, in one day, 3,000 lettuces and 150 punnets of strawberries.
sentences.translation: 这个负责照料它的年轻城市农民团队已经在一天之内采摘了3,000棵生菜和150小篮草莓。

structure.text: the team of young urban farmers

difficult_points: who tend it 是定语从句，it 指代前文的屋顶农场空间。
have picked 用现在完成时，强调产量已经达到的结果。
in one day 插在谓语和宾语之间，突出采摘量发生在一天内。

sentences.sentence: When the remaining two thirds of the vast open area are in production, 20 staff will harvest up to 1,000 kg of perhaps 35 different varieties of fruit and vegetables, every day.
sentences.translation: 当这片广阔开放区域剩下的三分之二投入生产时，20名员工每天将收获多达1,000公斤、约35个不同品种的水果和蔬菜。

structure.text: When the remaining two thirds of the vast open area are in production
the remaining two thirds of the vast open area
up to 1,000 kg of perhaps 35 different varieties of fruit and vegetables

difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，说明产量预测成立的条件。
the remaining two thirds 表示尚未投产的剩余面积，不是全部面积。
up to 表示最高可达，后面的重量和品种数都描述预计日收成。

sentences.sentence: 'We're not ever, obviously, going to feed the whole city this way,' cautions Hardy.
sentences.translation: 哈迪提醒说：“显然，我们永远不可能用这种方式养活整座城市。”

structure.text: 'We're not ever, obviously, going to feed the whole city this way,'
going to feed the whole city this way

difficult_points: 引号内是直接引语，cautions Hardy 是后置的引述句。
not ever 加强否定语气，表示“绝不会”。
this way 指代前文描述的城市屋顶农场种植方式。

sentences.sentence: 'In the urban environment you're working with very significant practical constraints, clearly, on what you can do and where.
sentences.translation: “在城市环境中，你在能做什么、能在哪里做这件事上，显然会受到非常重大的实际限制。

structure.text: you're working with very significant practical constraints
on what you can do and where
what you can do and where

difficult_points: 句子开头保留开放引号，说明它是较长直接引语的一部分。
working with constraints 表示在限制条件下行事，而不是“和限制一起工作”。
what you can do and where 是 on 的宾语，概括城市农业在内容和地点上的限制。

sentences.sentence: But if enough unused space can be developed like this, there's no reason why you shouldn't eventually target maybe between 5% and 10% of consumption.'
sentences.translation: 但如果能像这样开发出足够多的闲置空间，那么你最终完全有理由把目标定在满足大约5%到10%的消费量上。”

structure.text: But if enough unused space can be developed like this
why you shouldn't eventually target maybe between 5% and 10% of consumption

difficult_points: if 引导条件从句，说明达到消费占比目标的前提。
can be developed 是被动语态，强调闲置空间被开发利用。
why 引导定语从句，解释 no reason 的具体内容。

expressions.meaning_zh: 把目标定在大约5%到10%之间

sentences.sentence: Perhaps most significantly, however, this is a real-life showcase for the work of Hardy's flourishing urban agriculture consultancy, Agripolis, which is currently fielding enquiries from around the world to design, build and equip a new breed of soil-free inner-city farm.
sentences.translation: 不过，也许最重要的是，这个农场是哈迪蓬勃发展的城市农业咨询公司 Agripolis 工作成果的真实展示；这家公司目前正收到来自世界各地的咨询，内容是设计、建造并装备一种新型无土城市中心农场。

structure.text: is a real-life showcase for the work of Hardy's flourishing urban agriculture consultancy, Agripolis
which is currently fielding enquiries from around the world
to design, build and equip a new breed of soil-free inner-city farm

difficult_points: however 插入句首，承接前文并强调新的重点。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，先行词是 Agripolis。
to design, build and equip 表示 enquiries 涉及的目的或服务内容。

expressions.meaning_zh: 真实场景中的展示案例

sentences.sentence: 'The method's advantages are many,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“这种方法有很多优势。”
difficult_points: 引号内为直接引语，he says 是引述来源。
many 作表语，意思是“数量很多”。
method 指代前文的无土城市农业种植方法。

sentences.sentence: 'First, I don't much like the fact that most of the fruit and vegetables we eat have been treated with something like 17 different pesticides, or that the intensive farming techniques that produced them are such huge generators of greenhouse gases.
sentences.translation: “首先，我不太喜欢这样一个事实：我们吃的大多数水果和蔬菜都被大约17种不同的农药处理过，或者生产它们的集约化农业技术会产生如此大量的温室气体。

structure.text: I don't much like the fact
that most of the fruit and vegetables we eat have been treated with something like 17 different pesticides
or that the intensive farming techniques that produced them are such huge generators of greenhouse gases

difficult_points: the fact 后由两个 that 从句并列说明哈迪不喜欢的事实。
we eat 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 fruit and vegetables。
have been treated 是现在完成时的被动语态，强调食物被农药处理过。

sentences.sentence: I don't much like the fact, either, that they've travelled an average of 2,000 refrigerated kilometres to my plate, that their quality is so poor, because the varieties are selected for their capacity to withstand such substantial journeys, or that 80% of the price I pay goes to wholesalers and transport companies, not the producers.'
sentences.translation: 我也不太喜欢这样的事实：它们平均经过2,000公里冷藏运输才到我的盘子里；它们质量很差，因为品种是按承受如此漫长运输的能力来选择的；或者我支付的价格中有80%流向了批发商和运输公司，而不是生产者。”

structure.text: I don't much like the fact, either
that they've travelled an average of 2,000 refrigerated kilometres to my plate
that their quality is so poor
because the varieties are selected for their capacity to withstand such substantial journeys
or that 80% of the price I pay goes to wholesalers and transport companies, not the producers

difficult_points: that 从句连续并列，逐项说明哈迪不认同传统供应链的原因。
because 从句解释质量差的原因：品种被选择来承受长途运输。
I pay 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 the price。
not the producers 与前面的 wholesalers and transport companies 对比，强调收益分配问题。

sentences.sentence: Produce grown using this soil-free method, on the other hand – which relies solely on a small quantity of water, enriched with organic nutrients, pumped around a closed circuit of pipes, towers and trays – is 'produced up here, and sold locally, just down there.
sentences.translation: 另一方面，用这种无土方法种植的农产品——这种方法只依赖少量添加了有机营养物的水，这些水在由管道、塔和托盘组成的封闭回路中循环——是在“这里上面生产，并就在下面本地销售的。

structure.text: Produce grown using this soil-free method
which relies solely on a small quantity of water
pumped around a closed circuit of pipes, towers and trays
is 'produced up here, and sold locally, just down there

difficult_points: Produce 在这里是不可数名词，指农产品，不是动词。
grown using this soil-free method 是过去分词短语，修饰 Produce。
破折号中的 which 从句解释这种方法如何运作，句子主干要跨过插入语来看。
produced 和 sold 是并列的被动动作，说明生产和销售距离很近。

sentences.sentence: It barely travels at all,' Hardy says.
sentences.translation: 它几乎根本不需要运输，”哈迪说。
difficult_points: It 指代前一句中的 produce，即用这种方法种植的农产品。
barely ... at all 构成强烈的否定意味，表示几乎不运输。
Hardy says 是后置引述句，说明直接引语来源。

sentences.sentence: 'You can select crop varieties for their flavour, not their resistance to the transport and storage chain, and you can pick them when they're really at their best, and not before.'
sentences.translation: “你可以根据风味来选择作物品种，而不是根据它们对运输和储存链的耐受性来选择；你也可以在它们真正处于最佳状态时采摘，而不是提前采摘。”

structure.text: 'You can select crop varieties for their flavour
not their resistance to the transport and storage chain
when they're really at their best

difficult_points: 两个 you can 分句并列，分别说明品种选择和采摘时机。
not their resistance... 与 for their flavour 对比，突出选择标准的变化。
when 引导时间状语从句，说明采摘发生在品质最佳时。

sentences.sentence: No soil is exhausted, and the water that gently showers the plants' roots every 12 minutes is recycled, so the method uses 90% less water than a classic intensive farm for the same yield.
sentences.translation: 土壤不会被耗竭，而且每12分钟轻轻喷淋植物根部的水会被回收利用，因此这种方法在获得相同产量时比传统集约化农场少用90%的水。

structure.text: that gently showers the plants' roots every 12 minutes
so the method uses 90% less water than a classic intensive farm for the same yield

difficult_points: No soil is exhausted 使用被动语态，说明这种方法不会消耗土壤。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 water，描述水的作用和频率。
so 引导结果分句，说明循环用水带来的节水效果。

sentences.sentence: Urban farming is not, of course, a new phenomenon.
sentences.translation: 当然，城市农业并不是一种新现象。
difficult_points: of course 是插入语，表示作者认为这一点显而易见。
not 否定的是 a new phenomenon，说明城市农业早已存在。
Urban farming 作整体概念，是句子的主语。

sentences.sentence: Inner-city agriculture is booming from Shanghai to Detroit and Tokyo to Bangkok.
sentences.translation: 从上海到底特律、从东京到曼谷，城市中心农业正在蓬勃发展。

structure.text: from Shanghai to Detroit and Tokyo to Bangkok

difficult_points: is booming 使用现在进行时，强调这种趋势正在快速发展。
from Shanghai to Detroit and Tokyo to Bangkok 用多个城市说明范围广泛。
Inner-city agriculture 与 urban farming 意义接近，指城市内部的农业实践。

expressions.meaning_zh: 从上海到底特律；表示范围广

sentences.sentence: Strawberries are being grown in disused shipping containers, mushrooms in underground carparks.
sentences.translation: 草莓正在废弃的集装箱里种植，蘑菇则种在地下停车场里。
difficult_points: are being grown 是现在进行时的被动语态，表示正在被种植。
mushrooms in underground carparks 省略了 are being grown，形成并列省略。
disused 表示“不再使用的”，说明集装箱被改造成种植空间。

sentences.sentence: Aeroponic farming, he says, is 'virtuous'.
sentences.translation: 他说，气雾栽培是一种“有益的”做法。
difficult_points: he says 插在主语和谓语之间，是引述插入语。
virtuous 加引号，表示这是哈迪对气雾栽培的评价用词。
Aeroponic farming 指不依赖土壤、通过雾化营养液种植的方式。

sentences.sentence: The equipment weighs little, can be installed on almost any flat surface and is cheap to buy: roughly €100 to €150 per square metre.
sentences.translation: 这种设备重量很轻，几乎可以安装在任何平坦表面上，而且购买成本低：每平方米约100到150欧元。

structure.text: can be installed on almost any flat surface

difficult_points: weighs、can be installed 和 is cheap 三个谓语并列，共用主语 The equipment。
can be installed 是被动语态，强调设备对安装位置的适应性。
冒号后的价格具体解释 cheap to buy 的程度。

sentences.sentence: It is cheap to run, too, consuming a tiny fraction of the electricity used by some techniques.
sentences.translation: 它运行起来也很便宜，只消耗某些技术所用电量的一小部分。

structure.text: consuming a tiny fraction of the electricity used by some techniques

difficult_points: It 指代前一句的 equipment。
cheap to run 表示运行成本低，不是购买价格低。
consuming... 是现在分词短语，补充说明运行成本低的原因。

sentences.sentence: Produce grown this way typically sells at prices that, while generally higher than those of classic intensive agriculture, are lower than soil-based organic growers.
sentences.translation: 以这种方式种植的农产品通常售价高于传统集约化农业产品，但低于土壤种植的有机产品。

structure.text: that, while generally higher than those of classic intensive agriculture, are lower than soil-based organic growers
while generally higher than those of classic intensive agriculture

difficult_points: Produce 是主语，grown this way 是过去分词短语修饰它。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 prices。
while generally higher... 是让步插入成分，说明价格比较有两个方向。

sentences.sentence: There are limits to what farmers can grow this way, of course, and much of the produce is suited to the summer months.
sentences.translation: 当然，农民用这种方式能种什么是有限的，而且许多农产品适合夏季月份。

structure.text: to what farmers can grow this way
what farmers can grow this way
and much of the produce is suited to the summer months

difficult_points: There are limits 是存在句，核心含义是存在限制。
what farmers can grow this way 是 what 引导的名词性从句，作 to 的宾语。
is suited to 表示“适合”，说明这种种植方式受季节影响。

sentences.sentence: 'Root vegetables we cannot do, at least not yet,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“根茎类蔬菜我们还做不了，至少现在还不行。”
difficult_points: Root vegetables 被前置，强调这种作物类型是限制所在。
cannot do 在语境中表示“无法种植/操作”，不是一般的“不能做”。
at least not yet 暗示未来可能会有技术改进。

sentences.sentence: 'Radishes are OK, but carrots, potatoes, that kind of thing – the roots are simply too long.
sentences.translation: “萝卜可以，但胡萝卜、土豆之类的东西——它们的根实在太长了。

structure.text: but carrots, potatoes, that kind of thing
the roots are simply too long

difficult_points: but 后的 carrots, potatoes, that kind of thing 与 Radishes are OK 形成对比。
破折号后的分句解释为什么这些作物不适合。
simply 加强语气，表示根长这一问题很直接、很明显。

sentences.sentence: Fruit trees are obviously not an option.
sentences.translation: 果树显然也不是一个可行选择。
difficult_points: obviously 是态度副词，表示说话者认为结论很明显。
not an option 表示不可行，而不是“没有选择”。
Fruit trees 承接前文对可种植作物限制的讨论。

sentences.sentence: And beans tend to take up a lot of space for not much return.'
sentences.translation: 而豆类往往占用很多空间，却没有多少回报。”
difficult_points: And 连接前面对不适合作物的连续举例。
tend to 表示一种通常倾向，而不是绝对规律。
for not much return 说明占用空间与产出不成比例。

expressions.text: take up a lot of space

sentences.sentence: Nevertheless, urban farming of the kind being practised in Paris is one part of a bigger and fast-changing picture that is bringing food production closer to our lives.
sentences.translation: 尽管如此，巴黎正在实践的这种城市农业，是一个更大且快速变化的图景的一部分，而这个图景正把食物生产拉近到我们的生活之中。

structure.text: urban farming of the kind being practised in Paris
is one part of a bigger and fast-changing picture
that is bringing food production closer to our lives

difficult_points: Nevertheless 表示让步转折，承接前文关于限制的讨论。
being practised in Paris 是现在分词被动短语，修饰 the kind。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 picture，说明整体趋势的影响。

expressions.text: bring food production closer to our lives
expressions.meaning_zh: 让食物生产更贴近我们的生活
